diagrams.title: Data Center Energy Distribution
diagrams.description: Shows how energy is consumed in a typical data center according to the 5-95 rule
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where energy efficiency improvements can have the biggest impact

diagrams.title: Green Computing Framework
diagrams.description: Four pillars of green computing with key strategies under each
elements: Energy Efficiency - Virtualisation, Power Management, Efficient Hardware
E-Waste Management - Recycling, Refurbishing, Proper Disposal
Sustainable Manufacturing - Eco-design, Reduced Materials, Local Sourcing
diagrams.purpose: Visual guide to comprehensive green IT strategies

diagrams.title: AI Carbon Footprint Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparing carbon emissions of various digital activities
elements: Training BERT model - 1,500kg CO2 (equivalent to 5 cars)
diagrams.purpose: Illustrating the relative environmental impact of different computing activities

diagrams.title: Server Virtualisation Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how multiple virtual machines run on a single physical server using a hypervisor
elements: Shared Resources: CPU, RAM, Storage, Network
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtualisation improves resource utilization and reduces energy consumption
